sections.section: Importer Notification - PIMS fields believed not required
sections.intro: The following fields have been identified as being present on the Importer Notification table, but we believe they are not required for the new live animals journey.

rows.comments: Not required for GBN-AG journey

rows.pims_field: Charity Address CityCharity Address CountryCharity Address Country ISO CodeCharity Address Line 1Charity Address Line 2Charity Address Line 3Charity Address PostcodeCharity Approval NumberCharity Company NameCharity Consignor EmailCharity IdCharity Individual NameCharity International TelephoneCharity International Telephone ISO CodeCharity Other IdentifierCharity StatusCharity TelephoneCharity TypeCharity UK Telephone
rows.comments: We don’t believe Charity information is being captured in the GBN-AG notification. to confirm

rows.pims_field: Commodity CodeCommodity Complement IdCommodity Complement NameCommodity Complements TextCommodity DescriptionCommodity ID TypesCommodity Intended ForCommodity Species ClassCommodity Species Class NameCommodities Species Common NameCommodity Species IdCommodity Species NameCommodity Species NominationCommodity Species TypeComplex Commodity Selected
rows.comments: All commodity/species information will now be captured in a child table, with one row per species (see commodity table below) to confirm if this assumption is correct, and we don’t want to store any of these fields directly at the notification level

rows.pims_field: Consignee Address Line 3Consignee Approval NumberConsignee Country ISO Code*Consignee IdConsignee International TelephoneConsignee International Telephone ISO CodeConsignee Other IdentifierConsignee StatusConsignee TypeConsignee UK Telephone
rows.comments: These additional consignee fields are not expected to be received as part of the GBN-AG journey. to confirmMight want ISO code for country for ROW

rows.comments: As above

rows.pims_field: Transporter Address Line 3Transporter Country ISO CodeTransporter Details RequiredTransporter IdTransporter International TelephoneTransporter International Telephone ISO CodeTransporter Other IdentifierTransporter UK Telephone

rows.pims_field: Person Responsible CityPerson Responsible Company IdPerson Responsible Contact IdPerson Responsible FaxPerson Responsible IdPerson Responsible PostcodePerson Responsible Type
rows.comments: The address information for Person Responsible is stored in a single address field, so the additional address fields are not required. Also assuming the other Id and Type fields are no longer required.

rows.pims_field: Place of Original Harvest - multiple fields
rows.comments: Should this become the “Place of Origin”?
This field looks to have been used as an alternative to the related document entity. Now that document information is stored in a related table, we believe this field is not required to be populated
Was this field replaced by Purpose of Consignment? Or was it used only for CVEDP type notifications, which we no longer receive? In either case, it’s assumed we don’t need it for the GBN-AG journey

rows.live_animal_data_field: Animal Identifier - MicrochipLeg ringPassportTattooEar TagIdentification DetailsDescription
rows.comments: Store this at an individual animal level - new table that is child of the species tableConditional question - will see different identifiers depending on the commodityeg bovines have an ear tag, dogs have passports, etc. But the last two fields are for all animalsAll optional as some information not available till close to the time, but notifiers often don’t bother to fill them in . Might make it required at portal level to supply one identifier at least. Bees will be different - need to distinguish between honey and bumblebees, might end up captured at this level
